---
title: "A review of Object-based image analysis (OBIA) in (UAV) remote sensing"
id: materialspat-analysis-0
order: 142
summary: "An overview of OBIA especially for land-cover mapping purposes using remote-sensing imagery."
source_url: "https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S092427161630661X"
modules:
  - module-hr-analysis
Goals:
  - module-goals-spat-analysis
activities:
  - activity-analysis-0
  - activity-analysis-1
assessments:
  - assessment-spat-analysis
labels:
  - advanced
  - mandatory
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/spatial_analysis/materialspat-analysis-0.md"
---

Read the article:

<https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S092427161630661X>

## Connected Module

- [Analysis of high resolution aerial data](../modules/module-hr-analysis.qmd)
